instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall allow park engagement only when the vehicle is stationary.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall permit park engagement when Vehicle_Speed equals zero.

expected_output: IF Vehicle_Speed > 0 AND Shift_Request = Park THEN Reject_Shift_Request
IF Vehicle_Speed_Sensor_Fault = TRUE THEN Park_Engagement = Disabled
